heading: vector Type Limitations
body:
The following limitations apply:

- You can't index fields with arrays of objects (MongoDB Search
  `embeddedDocuments` type) as `vector` type.

- You can't set [storedSource](fts-stored-source-definition) to
  `true` in index definitions that contain `vector` type. Instead,
  use `include` to specify the fields to store on `mongot` or use
  `exclude` to exclude the `vector` type field from storage.

- You can't use the [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch) stage to query fields
  indexed as the `vector` type.

- You can index fields as the `vector` type in the MongoDB Search Playground.
